summary: Iteration 151 - SMS Phase 4: Terminal Messages UI Testing. All backend tests passed (22/22). Frontend Messages UI fully functional with Queue (Pending/Sent/Failed tabs), Compose, Blast, and Templates views. All 10 templates displayed with Active badges and edit buttons. Existing terminal modes (Sales, PO Check, Transfers) working correctly - no regression.
critical_code_review_comments: TerminalMessages.jsx correctly implements all 4 views: Queue, Compose, Blast, Templates
Queue view has proper status tabs (Pending/Sent/Failed) with counts from stats API
Compose view has customer search, message textarea (320 char limit), and Queue Message button
Blast view has min_balance filter, branch display, message textarea, and Send Blast button
Templates view displays all 10 templates with Active/Disabled badges and edit/toggle buttons
TerminalShell.jsx correctly adds Messages to TABS array with MessageSquare icon and purple color
Messages mode accessible via floating mode selector at bottom-left
Axios interceptor in TerminalShell auto-adds branch_id to GET requests for proper filtering
All data-testid attributes properly implemented for testing
test_credentials: Super Admin: janmarkeahig@gmail.com / Aa@58798546521325, Manager PIN: 521325
seed_data_creation: None - used existing SMS queue data
context_for_next_testing_agent: SMS Phase 4 Terminal Messages UI complete. Messages tab added to terminal floating mode selector. Queue view shows Pending/Sent/Failed tabs with counts. Compose allows manual SMS to customer. Blast allows promo to multiple customers with filters. Templates view shows all 10 templates with edit/toggle functionality. Pending SMS items have 'Send via SMS App', 'Mark Sent', and 'Skip' buttons. Failed SMS items have 'Retry' button. No actual SMS gateway connected - messages are queued for external gateway app to poll.

tests_performed.test: Backend: All 22 SMS and Terminal tests
tests_performed.details: Templates, settings, queue, manual send, blast, stats, credential-pair, pairing code all working
Admin login with branch selection working

tests_performed.test: Frontend: Messages option in mode selector
Frontend: Queue view with status tabs
tests_performed.details: Pending/Sent/Failed tabs with counts, refresh button
Customer search, message textarea (320 char), Queue Message button
Min balance filter, branch display, message textarea, Send Blast button
10 templates displayed with Active badges, edit and toggle buttons
PO list with For Checking status displayed

tests_not_completed: Pending SMS action buttons (Send via SMS App, Mark Sent, Skip) - no pending SMS in queue to test
Failed SMS Retry button - no failed SMS in queue to test
Template editing - not tested (would require clicking edit, modifying, saving)

mocked_apis.note: SMS queue stores messages but no actual SMS gateway connected. Gateway app will poll GET /api/sms/queue/pending and mark sent via PATCH /{id}/mark-sent
